name: Hovercraft
label: Tag/DGC Records

members.name: Beth Liebling
members.notes: Married to Eddie Vedder during Hovercraft active period

discography.title: Akathisia
discography.label: Tag/DGC
discography.notes: Akathisia = inability to remain still (medical term). Debut.

discography.title: The Alpha/Omega
discography.label: DGC
discography.notes: Double album concept piece. Most ambitious statement.

aesthetic.vocals: None -- by design. Defining aesthetic choice.
aesthetic.primary_texture: Dense layered guitars, feedback as composition, drone, sustained tone

connections.description: Sharp-shinned Hawk (E=5). Smallest accipiter. Precision and constraint. Both easy to overlook, rewarding close attention.
Wellwater Conspiracy (E=6). Space rock to art rock. Cameron-McBain to Liebling-Shinn. Scale descends.
Gas Huffer (E=7). Largest energy jump in sequence. Wordless precision to chaotic punk. Capitol Hill to Fremont.

milestones: MOST MINIMAL BAND IN CURRENT SEQUENCE
